rationale: Educ. Code §39.0821 governs comptroller review of district resource allocation practices. It does not reference homestead exemptions or set tax policy, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: The comptroller shall identify school districts and campuses that use resource allocation practices that contribute to high academic achievement and cost-effective operations.
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on district operating costs is possible but not a textual conflict.
